case_title: LEA, BARBARA J. VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (MUNICIPAL RAILWAY)

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (MUNICIPAL RAILWAY)
